query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'vehicles' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%user%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%owner%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'vehicles' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%user%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%owner%');
